trigger_condition.note: Recalculate when average trade and standard deviation change significantly

sizing_rule.note: Optimal f = 0.262; trade 1 contract per $31,305.92 in account equity. Recalculate optimal f when market system parameters change (stretch/shrink affected) or worst-case P&L significantly impacted.

source_rule_text: Adjust position sizing based on changes in market system parameters; recalculate optimal f when average trade and standard deviation change significantly.
